title: rubus × hololeucoides
intro: Rubus × hololeucoides, also known as the blackberry or thimbleberry hybrid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the rose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus × hololeucodes include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, or used as a topical application for skin issues, such as wounds and irritations.
